Home / Services / Outdoor Stone Masonry

Outdoor Stone Masonry

Add timeless beauty and durability to your outdoor space with custom stonework.

Build It Construction specializes in creating stunning outdoor stone features that enhance the beauty and value of your property. From stone patios and walkways to retaining walls and outdoor fireplaces, we deliver exceptional craftsmanship and lasting results. We work with a variety of natural stones, including limestone, sandstone, and granite, to create unique and durable features that complement your home's architecture and landscaping. Our experienced masons are skilled in a variety of techniques, including dry-stacking, mortaring, and veneering, to create custom designs that meet your specific needs and preferences. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage and structural integrity to withstand the Texas climate. Whether you're looking to create a cozy outdoor living space or add curb appeal to your home, our stone masonry services will transform your outdoor space into a beautiful and functional extension of your home. We handle everything from design and material selection to installation and finishing, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design and material selection
  2. 02 Step 2: Site preparation and excavation
  3. 03 Step 3: Stone installation and mortaring
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing and sealing

Benefits

  • Enhanced curb appeal
  • Increased property value
  • Durable and long-lasting
  • Custom designs

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of stone is best for outdoor use in Arlington?

Limestone and sandstone are popular choices due to their durability and resistance to weathering. We can help you select the best stone for your specific project and budget.

Do I need a permit for a stone patio or walkway?

Typically, permits are required for structures exceeding a certain size or those that alter drainage patterns. We can assist you with the permitting process.

How do I maintain my stone patio or walkway?

Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and water is generally sufficient. We can also recommend sealants to protect your stone from stains and weathering.
